description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, surrounded by lush palm trees and landscaped greenery. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The front includes a driveway with a parked car, a small covered porch area, and a visible garage. The rear and side views reveal multiple outdoor seating areas, a patio, and a rooftop terrace. The building is primarily finished in white and light gray tones, with some wooden accents on the upper level and roof structures. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wooden accents, and lush landscaping, featuring open patios and a rooftop terrace.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main entrance, driveway, and lush palm landscaping with a clear view of the rooftop terrace.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, garage, main entrance, and symmetrical palm trees flanking the facade.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the wooden-accented upper structure, patio area, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Back view revealing large glass windows, sliding doors, outdoor seating, and the open patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
